description: Leaf-screen-halt: a payment-authority delegation chain cannot anchor a PII_BLOCKED screen action. The leaf_action_ref correctly recomputes to the screen's action_ref (leaf-anchoring passes), but the screen's preimage scope is not the authorized leaf hop scope, so the chain is rejected on scope_mismatch_at_leaf. Authorization over a payment does not cover a leaf whose identity is a different action.
narrowing_rule: hops[i].scope must equal hops[i-1].scope OR start with hops[i-1].scope + ':'. The wildcard '*' at the end of a scope matches any sub-namespace.

vectors.description: Chain authorizes a payment (mycelium:* -> mycelium:payment -> mycelium:payment:route), but leaf_action_ref anchors a PII_BLOCKED presidio screen (presidio:x402.screen:PII_BLOCKED:EMAIL_ADDRESS,US_SSN). Leaf-anchoring recompute matches the screen action_ref, but the leaf scope is not the authorized leaf hop scope. A payment authorization cannot anchor a screen-halt action.
vectors.failure_detail: leaf_preimage.scope='presidio:x402.screen:PII_BLOCKED:EMAIL_ADDRESS,US_SSN' != hops[-1].scope='mycelium:payment:route'; the PII_BLOCKED screen is a different action than the authorized payment-route leaf.
